meta.title: The T-7 Red Hawk is about to change fighter pilot training forever
meta.description:
If the T-38 was a trainer for the Century-series jets of the early Cold War, Boeing and Saab's new T-7 is a trainer for the tech-centric tactics of 5th and 6th-generation fighters — and the Air Force’s Air Education and Training Command just took delivery of the first one.
